---
title: "Remote team-based learning during COVID-19: lower academic performance is associated with the exclusion of test grades from final grades"
date: 2025-01-24
author:
  - name: Magdalon, Juliana
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Aun, Marcelo Vivolo
  - name: Madeira, Marcelo
  - name: Pereira, Welbert De Oliveira
  - name: Daniel, Durval Anibal
  - name: Pires, Elda Maria Stafuzza Gonçalves
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Einstein (São Paulo)"
  volume: 23
  doi: "10.31744/einstein_journal/2025AO1007"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Remote team-based learning during COVID-19: lower academic performance is associated with the exclusion of test grades from final grades</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
